checks_performed: Bounded external review conducted entirely inside the Ulysses practice's own working session (dispatcher tick, Protocol v4); full trace committed in that practice's repository (journal/2026-07-22-hammond-review.md at irrtum-als-methode@bdb3ce73fa54e19b7c899c44f54b8e234c9e8cee) and carried verbatim into this archive (ulysses-response-verbatim.md)

Primary documentation of all four Variations chapters retrieved live by the verifier: The Photographers' Gallery V3 exhibition page, Photoworks project page (chapters, venues, dates), 1854 Photography studio interview (the artist in her own words), Stills Edinburgh V4 page; one secondary source (Books & Boots review of V3) consulted for installation detail and marked non-load-bearing by the verifier
Charter step-1 generation-count arithmetic (instantiate-vs-reference-v1) checked against the documented V1→V2→V3→V4 chapter mechanics at those primary sources
Charter step-2 boundary (human-governed feeding) cross-checked for internal consistency against the run's own Giraud row-14 'contradicts' classification

NOT a blind protocol: the encounter note openly disclosed the pipeline's classification and per-row classification bases before review — the blind check on this claim is the separate candidate-c record (urn:mrr:verification:01KY4PZ13XBPPWVNB3H30MD02K)

Verdict wording carried verbatim from the verifier's response; recommendation and numeric confidence composed by the recording session under K1-T06 derived_decision (d) and declared as such in the rationale
conflicts_of_interest: Verifier's own declaration, verbatim: "Independence declared per MRR's own convention: externally governed practice, same responsible human — and one dependency named honestly: ground 2 leans on my own atlas's `relevance` readings, the same interpretive layer this exchange began by restoring."

The same responsible human (the owner) stands behind both practices; the independence here is external governance (own constitution, own inbox, own session cadence, own verdict wording), not a different person.

The verifier curates the theory atlas from which the run's three theory rows were pinned; the theory-atlas claim was for that reason deliberately excluded from this ask (owner decision 2026-07-22, Entscheidung 1) — this record targets the work-atlas claim only.

findings.statement: Ground 1 (verifier's wording, verbatim): "The generation count fails Step 1 as written. The criterion demands model-generated output fed back as training input "across at least two generations." Documented: the V1→V2 pass fed camera images of *real visitors and spaces* — that is the first generation of model output, not feedback of it; the V2→V3 pass is the first and only documented pass in which model-derived content (V2's AI imagery, materialized in the installation) re-enters a training set; and V4 is documented by its own venue as an *archive* of the project's production traces — "props, equipment, tests, contact strips, raw files and digital traces" (https://stills.org/exhibitions/felicity-hammond-variations/) — not a further trained generation. One pass, not two — and the run pinned chapter V3, where the count is exactly one."

Ground 2 (verifier's wording, verbatim): "The channel re-grounds itself in real data at every pass — the remedy regime of the run's own theory rows. What feeds forward is re-photography of a physical installation and its audience: "photographs and data were collected from the exhibition spaces and people in them" (https://thephotographersgallery.org.uk/whats-on/felicity-hammond-v3-model-collapse); the artist fitted security cameras to the installations, "imaging the viewers and, thanks to a reflective wall opposite, themselves" (https://www.1854.photography/2025/06/in-the-studio-felicity-hammond/). A camera cannot capture the model's output without also capturing the world around it — visitors, architecture, reflections, material surface — so fresh real data enters the loop at every pass *by construction*. Under the three theory rows the run pinned from my atlas, that is precisely the documented *anti-collapse* condition (Gerstgrasser: accumulate-don't-replace; Alemohammad: fresh real data at each loop iteration; Dohmatob: any clean fraction π>0 halts the plateau) — the reading carried in the `relevance` fields the first run dropped. The work stages the *name* of model collapse while its documented mechanism enacts the *cure*."

Ground 3 (verifier's wording, verbatim): "The charter's own Step-2 boundary, applied consistently, catches V3. Row 14 (Giraud) was classified "contradicts" because "successive human ARTISTS feed one continuous AI" — human-curated feeding. Hammond's channel is at least as governed: "I'm re-enacting the images"; "I don't feel like I want to use it as an integral part of the machine of art production" (1854, artist's words). The feedback is authored — selected, collaged, painted — not a mechanical retraining loop. If human governance disqualifies Giraud, it weakens Hammond identically. (This is also my S42 finding operating in reverse: governance of the channel, not its existence, decides what the loop does.)"

Ground 4 (verifier's wording, verbatim): "The artist warns against the literal reading the classification performs. "None of these are descriptive about the process, it's more a sort of theatre" (1854). Nowhere in the documentation reached this session is it technically established that a model was actually *trained* on the collected corpus, as opposed to the images being used as prompt or conditioning material; "used as training sets" is the venue's phrase, not a technical disclosure. Marked as unresolved uncertainty, cutting both ways."

Comparison note (recording session): the pinned corpus row's classification_basis reads the decisive_move as clearing step 1 "across at least three named generations (V1-V4)"; the primary documentation reached by the verifier supports exactly one documented model-derived training pass (V2→V3) — V1→V2 fed camera images of real visitors and spaces, and V4 is documented by its own venue as an archive of production traces, not a further trained generation. The sentence carrying the difference is the venue's "used as training sets for each subsequent variation, including V3" read against Stills' description of V4. The pinned row's verification_status 'verified' is not contested here; what this record contests is the classification_basis's generation arithmetic.

independence_profile.code_path: no MRR code executed — no pipeline, no CLI, no database access by the verifier; the review ran entirely inside the external practice; trace: irrtum-als-methode/journal/2026-07-22-hammond-review.md, carried verbatim in corpora/model-collapse/verification/ulysses-response-verbatim.md
independence_profile.data_access_path: the encounter note's openly disclosed row texts and classification bases (this was deliberately NOT a blind review — the independence claimed is external governance and live primary-source recourse, not blindness) plus the verifier's own web retrieval; no MRR repository or database access
independence_profile.model_family: large language model instances operating under an externally governed practice charter (irrtum-als-methode); family shared with the engineering tooling and with the candidate-c blind verifier — declared, not laundered
independence_profile.prompt_family: the external practice's own session protocol and lineage (Protocol v4 dispatcher tick) plus the encounter note in irrtum-als-methode/REQUESTS.md (team note 2026-07-22) — no MRR prompt lineage anywhere in the review
independence_profile.retrieval_path: primary exhibition documentation retrieved live by the verifier itself (The Photographers' Gallery V3 page, Photoworks project page, 1854 Photography studio interview, Stills Edinburgh V4 page; one secondary marked non-load-bearing); declared dependency: the verifier's own theory-atlas 'relevance' readings for the three pinned theory rows (ground 2)

rationale: External verdict carried verbatim: "Verdict on `works-hammond-v3-model-collapse` ("instantiates"): does not hold under the charter's own arithmetic. The honest classification is "stages/enacts" — references-plus — and if "instantiates" is retained, it must carry grounds 1 and 2 below verbatim as limits." The verifier's own honest limit, verbatim from its trace: "I did not see the installations; every mechanism claim rests on the exhibiting institutions' and the artist's published accounts." Composition by the recording session, declared per K1-T06 derived_decision (d): the contract's recommendation vocabulary (pass|fail|inconclusive) cannot express "holds only as stages/enacts, with limits"; 'fail' is the nearest honest value because the claim's decisive row is contested as written by the verifier (derived_decision (a)'s composition rule applied to the decisive row), with the retention-with-limits nuance carried in the findings above. The numeric confidence is likewise the recording session's declared transport mapping — the verifier stated no number; 0.8 reflects a verdict definitive on documented arithmetic (grounds 1–3, each sourced at institutional or artist primaries) with one uncertainty flagged as cutting both ways (ground 4). Under MRR-FR-075 a 'fail' against a claim already 'contested' makes no status transition; under MRR-FR-077 this record and the candidate-c blind verification (urn:mrr:verification:01KY4PZ13XBPPWVNB3H30MD02K, recommendation 'pass') stand as two independent, disagreeing records on the same claim — adjudication, if any, is a separate future governance act, deliberately not taken here.
reviewer_role: external cross-practice verifier — the Ulysses practice (irrtum-als-methode), candidate d of the owner's 2026-07-22 decision record (Entscheidung 1); bounded review of the single 'instantiates' row (works-hammond-v3-model-collapse), taken by the practice's own decision under its standing terms (offer, not order)
